'''Deep Space Demolition and Removal''' was the [[Space station/Legends|space station]] from which [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Darnada]] ran [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] operations. It was destroyed by [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]. It was also responsible for disposing of the ship and corpses of [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine's]] family and crew after he turned to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and [[Death/Legends|killed]] them, and for disposing of the ship ''[[Woebegone]]'' after [[Darth Plagueis/Legends|Darth Plagueis]] killed the crew.

{{Station-stub}}
